headline: GEHC Acquires Intelerad to Boost Cloud-First, AI Imaging Capabilities
summary: GE HealthCare completes the $2.3B Intelerad deal to expand AI-driven imaging, boost recurring revenues and strengthen its cloud-first healthcare platform.
